lead: Fujitsu is set to phase out its mainframe business by 2035, paving the way for the rise of quantum AI supercomputers, which are expected to revolutionize computing capabilities.

stories.title: Fujitsu confirms mainframe biz to die in 2035, in time for quantum AI supercomputers to take over
stories.summary: Fujitsu has announced that it will discontinue its mainframe business by 2035, signaling a significant shift towards quantum AI supercomputers. This transition is anticipated to enhance computational power and efficiency, allowing for breakthroughs in various fields. The company aims to lead in the quantum computing space as traditional systems become obsolete.
